name: afrifx-academy
description: AfriFX Academy — Forex education platform (React + Express + Prisma + Postgres)

scripts.build: cd client && npm install --include=dev && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install && npx prisma generate
scripts.vercel-build: prisma generate --schema=server/prisma/schema.prisma && cd client && npm install --include=dev && npm run build
